_comment: Curated list of prominent individual voices (researchers, founders, practitioners) whose opinions are worth surfacing even when they aren't breaking news. Tweets from these handles bypass Stage 0 (software focus), Stage 3 (bot detection — they're verified humans), and Stage 3.5 (noise filter — their 'my take' tweets aren't engagement-bait). Their tweets are classified as OPINION by the TweetType classifier. Lowercase, no @. Edit freely — the singleton reloads on next call to reset_cache().
